regions: Europe, the Middle East, and Africa (EMEA)

supply_chain.dependencies: Substantial reliance on Flex as EMS provider; sole source providers for certain components; components sourced outside the United States subject to geopolitical risks
supply_chain.risks: Manufacturing and logistics delays; pricing fluctuations; supply shortages; supply chain disruption from inflationary pressures; geographically concentrated manufacturing operations in Asia vulnerable to regional disruptions; tensions between China and Taiwan; tensions between U.S. and China; tariffs on components imported for final manufacturing in the United States

regulatory_risks: U.S. export controls and economic sanctions (including Sanctions on Russia)
Import permit and license requirements for encryption technology in various countries
U.K. General Data Protection Regulation (UK GDPR)
California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) as amended by California Privacy Rights Act
State privacy laws in at least 19 states with 6 others pending
Data localization laws requiring data processing and storage within specific countries
Federal Trade Commission and state attorneys general enforcement actions for consumer protection
U.S. government requirements for products to be manufactured in the United States
New proposed legislation regulating AI in jurisdictions such as the E.U.
Climate-related and sustainability-related laws and regulations

sanction_risks: Sanctions on Russia in response to invasion of Ukraine
U.S. embargoed or sanctioned countries, governments, and persons
Compliance with governmental sanctions and export controls
Risk of increased Russian cyberattacks due to Ukraine conflict and Sanctions on Russia
